'''Connor Bailey''' (born 10 October 2000) is a professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|so|sh}} or {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]].

==Career==
===2020===
Bailey made his [[Super League]] debut in round 12 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for Wakefield against [[Hull FC]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/hull-vs-wakefield/teams/54474 |title=Starting Lineups - Hull vs Wakefield |publisher=Sky Sports |date=10 September 2020}}</ref>

===Newcastle Thunder (loan)===
On 5 Dec 2020 it was reported that he had signed for the [[Newcastle Thunder]] on season-long loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=5 Dec 2020|accessdate=22 Feb 2021|title=Newcastle sign Connor Bailey on loan from Wakefield|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/newcastle-sign-connor-bailey-on-loan-from-wakefield/}}</ref>

===Newcastle Thunder===
On 10 November 2021, it was reported that he had signed for [[Newcastle Thunder]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=10 Nov 2021|accessdate=24 Dec 2021|title=Wakefield's Connor Bailey makes move to Newcastle|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/wakefields-connor-bailey-makes-move-to-newcastle/}}</ref>

===York Knights===
On 27 October 2023, it was announced that Bailey had signed a two-year deal with the [[York Knights]].<ref>{{cite web|website=York RLFC|date=27 October 2023|access-date=30 October 2023|title=Bailey joins York as Knights strengthen forward pack|url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/bailey-joins-york-as-knights-strengthen-forward-pack}}</ref>

===Hull FC===
On 12 September 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=BBC Sport|date=12 Sep 2025|accessdate=27 Sep 2025|title=Hull FC sign York Knights forward Bailey|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cvg9e972mpgo}}</ref>
